summary: This document outlines the operational checklist and workflow for a pilot program involving KeepMeCompany's AI phone agents within NHS GP practices. It details regulatory requirements such as MHRA and IRAS registration, technical setup for telephony integration, and metrics for tracking patient and staff feedback. The plan covers phases from pre-pilot preparation through post-pilot analysis and reporting.
